summary: Release 4.5 (Multi-run collapse + generations log) — full backend + frontend verification. Backend: 26/26 live tests pass (7 in test_release_4_5_collapse_live.py + 19 new in test_release_4_5_collapse_extras.py). Verified upsert idempotency, archived filtering, generations envelope shape, stale→canonical redirect, and generation-row presence on a real computed MSME session. Frontend: all 6 module History buttons (clause44, bc, fa, fs, gst, msme) open the GenerationsDrawer correctly with proper title and either rows or empty state. No console errors on any landing page.

minor.issue: If the canonical winner doc has been hard-deleted (orphaned collapsed_into pointer), the route falls back to returning the archived doc itself with archived=True instead of 404/410. Observed for archived id 0e4cc62f-… whose winner 477895f6-… no longer exists. The redirect itself works correctly when the winner exists (verified for MSME and Clause 44). Cleanup-script gap, not a code bug per se.

verified.upsert_post_runs: All 5 modules (BC, FA, FS, GST, MSME) — POST with same {client_id, fy} returns identical id on repeat call. FS additionally requires fy_start/fy_end.
verified.archived_listing_filter: Confirmed via direct DB inspection that archived rows exist (fa_runs, msme_sessions, runs) yet GET /runs (and GET /api/runs?archived=false) never surface them.
verified.generations_envelope: Each module's GET /{run|session}/{id}/generations returns 200 with {run_id, generations: list}. Each row carries gen_id, module, client_id, period, summary_snapshot.
verified.stale_id_redirect_clause44: GET /api/runs/run_8d427d1f97e0 (archived) returns canonical run_7cc908029728 with archived=False.
verified.generation_row_after_compute: Canonical MSME session 25f823c3-… already has 1 synthesised generation row (final_disallowance=2,195,939.47, bills=65, disallowed=48) populated by the migration backfill — proves append works end-to-end.

frontend_history_drawers.clause44: [data-testid='clause44-open-history'] → drawer opens with title 'Tax Audit Utility' / module label, empty state for fresh run.
frontend_history_drawers.bc: [data-testid='bc-open-history'] → drawer opens with title 'Balance Confirmation', empty state. Button only renders when rid is in URL (correctly conditional).
frontend_history_drawers.fa: [data-testid='fa-open-history'] → drawer opens with title 'Fixed Assets · IT Depreciation', empty state.
frontend_history_drawers.gst: [data-testid='gst-open-history'] → button renders only after Resume selects a run (correct conditional on runId); drawer opens with title 'GST Turnover & ITC Reconciliation'.

verified.smoke_no_console_errors: Navigated to BC / FA / FS / GST / MSME / Clause 44 landings — zero console errors added in any.

action_items: [Optional / minor] Decide policy for orphaned collapsed_into pointer in fixed_assets/controller.get_run: either 410 Gone, or seamless 404, or fix the migration to ensure winner always exists. Currently returns the archived doc itself, which the frontend may render as 'archived=true' state. Same pattern likely exists in BC/FS/GST/MSME — only FA had a winner missing in current seed data.
critical_code_review_comments: library/generations.py — clean shared helper. Both append_generation and list_generations use a single canonical schema {gen_id, run_id, module, client_id, period, generated_by_email, generated_at, pinned_files_snapshot, summary_snapshot, synthesised}. Good.

All 6 modules — get_run/get_session implements the exact same redirect pattern (archived && collapsed_into → fetch winner). Could be refactored into a tiny helper in modules/library/collapse_utils.py to DRY up the duplicated 4-line block, but acceptable as-is.

GenerationsDrawer.jsx — properly cancels in-flight fetch on unmount via the cancelled flag; renders empty/loading/list states distinctly with data-testid hooks. summaryLines() switch covers all 6 modules and degrades gracefully when fields are missing.

balance_confirmation/Landing.jsx + fixed_assets/Landing.jsx + gst_recon/Landing.jsx — History button correctly conditional on rid/runId so it doesn't render on the empty 'pick a run' state. Sensible UX.
POST /api/balance-confirmation/runs is idempotent regardless of empty payload fields (e.g., as_at_date defaults). Good.

Clause 44 list still has multiple non-archived 'Single scope' rows for the same client/fy — likely differentiated by scope_type/division so it's not a collapse violation, but worth flagging visually if it ever becomes confusing for auditors.
seed_data_creation: No new fixtures created — used existing client cli_ad137f29aebb (ABC Textile Mills) and pre-seeded archived rows from the migration to verify redirect behaviour.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) test_release_4_5_collapse_extras.py is the regression suite for Release 4.5 — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set in env. 2) Stale-id redirect in fixed_assets/controller.py has an edge case: if winner doc was hard-deleted (orphaned pointer), it returns the archived doc itself rather than 404 — only fa_runs has that orphan in current DB; could be reproduced or fixed in next release. 3) Clause 44 still shows 2 active 'Single scope' runs for ABC Textile Mills FY 2023-24; verify whether that's intentional (different division/scope_type) or a collapse miss. 4) Frontend conditional rendering: BC/FA/GST History buttons only render when a run is loaded — their landing-only URL won't show the button (this matches the spec: 'working-doc page shows a History button in its header').
rca of the issue: n/a — no defects blocking the release. Single minor edge case (orphaned collapsed_into in FA) noted under action_items.
